entry.title: ASUS AuraSync Kernel Stack Based Buffer Overflow Local Privilege Escalation

entry.summary: 0x01: Details Title : ASUS AuraSync Kernel Stack Based Buffer Overflow Local Privilege Escalation CVE ID : Advisory Published: 2022/08/10 Advisory URL : https://www.asus.com/content/ASUS-Product-Security-Advisory/ Vender URL : https://www.asus.com/ 0x02: Test Environment OS : windows 10 pro 64-bit 21H2 (build 19044.1826) ASUS AuraSync : 1.07.79_V2.2 0x03: Vulerability details ...

entry.title: CVE-2022-39846: DLL hijacking vulnerability in Smart Switch PC

entry.title: CVE-2022-24924: Improper access control vulnerability in LiveWallpaperService

link.title: CVE-2022-24924: Improper access control vulnerability in LiveWallpaperService

entry.summary: Improper access control vulnerability in LiveWallpaperService Windows version tested: Windows 10 20H2 (Build 19042.1348) 64bit Live Wallpaper Version: 3.0.9.0 or earlier There is a LiveWallpaperService that works by default in Samsung laptops, but there was a vulnerability that created the SYSTEM directory in a directory with SYSTEM privileges in the SYSTEM service. Live Wallpaper is usuall...
